code_improvement.description: Runs ruff, surfaces performance regressions, records quality snapshots

pattern_discovery.description: Discovers success patterns, anti-patterns, and capability trends

agent_gatherer.description: Scans for new agent definitions, finds coverage gaps, generates skeletons

code_improvement.description: Every 6 hours — opens a GitHub Issue with lint findings

pattern_discovery.description: Daily at 09:00 UTC — opens a GitHub Issue with pattern analysis

agent_gatherer.description: Weekly Monday 10:00 UTC — opens a draft PR with skeleton definitions
